argument.script: async (intermediate) => { for (let i = 0; i < 10; i++) { const placementTracking = document.querySelector('[data-testid="placementTracking"]'); if (placementTracking) return { ready: true }; await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 500)); } return { ready: false }; }

async (intermediate) => { if (!intermediate.ready) return { ok: false, message: 'Could not find placementTracking. Are you logged in?' }; const placementTracking = document.querySelector('[data-testid="placementTracking"]'); const username = '{{ username }}'.replace(/^@/, ''); try { let attempts = 0; let followBtn = null; while (attempts < 20) { const unfollowBtn = placementTracking.querySelector('[data-testid$="-unfollow"]'); if (unfollowBtn) return { ok: true, message: 'Already following @' + username + '.' }; followBtn = placementTracking.querySelector('[data-testid$="-follow"]'); if (followBtn) break; await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 500)); attempts++; } if (!followBtn) return { ok: false, message: 'Could not find Follow button. Are you logged in?' }; followBtn.click(); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 1500)); const verify = placementTracking.querySelector('[data-testid$="-unfollow"]'); if (verify) return { ok: true, message: 'Successfully followed @' + username + '.' }; return { ok: false, message: 'Follow action initiated but UI did not update.' }; } catch (e) { return { ok: false, message: String(e) }; } }
